series_metadata.series_description: The project management artifacts describe the documentation that aids in the management of a project. Examples of project management artifacts include, but are not limited to, the IT Project Request Business Case (DPS 0240), project charter,scope statements, project plans (including communications plan scope management plan, cost management plan, quality management plan,etc.),scope statement, project estimates and project actuals, project communications, risk log, issue log, status reports, and other related correspondence.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 3 years after project is closed, or the decision is made not to implement the project and then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain 3 years after project is closed, or the decision is made not to implement the project and then destroy., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
